generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
network: No internet connection. Scores are saved locally.
rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please try again in 5 minutes.
code_invalid: Code invalid or expired. Ask the organizer for a new code.
code_expired: Your code has expired. Ask the tournament desk for a new code.
magic_link_expired: Your link has expired. Request a new one via the login page.
tournament_finished: This tournament has ended. No more scores can be entered.
tournament_paused: This tournament is temporarily paused. Score entry is blocked.
leaderboard_unavailable: The leaderboard is temporarily unavailable due to high traffic. Please try again in a few minutes.
